working_on.task: Prepare the 1.11.0 minor release for the 1.11.x hardening roadmap

recent_changes: Secret scanning now includes untracked non-ignored files in Git repos.
Release manifests now carry dirty-tree provenance, and materialized overlay tests rebuild dist before asserting the full inherited solo-profile contract.
Solo-profile docs, release tiers, adoption signals, and release-tail workflows were hardened across Forge core and both host adapters.
Route-preview now seeds workflow-state that help and next can resume, and VERSION plus CHANGELOG.md were bumped for the 1.11.0 minor release.
verification: PYTHONPATH='tests' python -m unittest tests.test_secret_scan tests.release_repo_test_contracts tests.release_repo_test_overlays -v -> PASS
decisions_made: Treat fresh dist-bundle verification and workflow-state round-tripping as release-blocking contracts for 1.11.0.
Ship the 1.11.x hardening roadmap as a minor release because it adds capability-bearing routing, provenance, and release-tail behavior.
